---
title: "CV"
toc: false
---

This CV is generated reproducibly from Google Sheets, R, and GitHub Actions.
The workflow lives in
[`ReproducibleResumeCV`](https://github.com/TinasheMTapera/ReproducibleResumeCV).

[Open the PDF](https://github.com/TinasheMTapera/ReproducibleResumeCV/blob/main/long_form_cv/long_form_cv_vitae.pdf){target="_blank" .btn .btn-primary}
